---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for ClawSwarm
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Why does the current behavior fall short?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## API Design (if applicable)

If your request involves a new API or changes to an existing one, sketch it out:

```typescript
// Example usage of your proposed feature
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why do you prefer your proposal?

## Additional Context

Links, references, prior art, or any other context that helps explain the request.

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR for this
- [ ] I can help with design/feedback but not implementation
- [ ] No, just suggesting
